note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 4.0x1.8x0.8cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 50% gran, 50% slough. Periwound intact. NPWT canister changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Ramirez notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower leg wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Right lower leg measures 4.0 cm x 1.8 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 66% slough, 34% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Right lower leg — improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
